'''Mokka Falanthas''' was [[Minister of State]] for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Empire Reborn]] insurgency and [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. When [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] disappeared to rescue her kidnapped children, Falanthas took over her duties to keep the government running.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''
